title: Steamed Italian Collards Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free and herbal Italian dish featuring steamed collards with a blend of savory seasonings, perfect for meal prepping.
instructions: Clean and chop the collard greens into bite-sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic cloves, red pepper flakes, and salt. Sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chopped collard greens to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until slightly wilted but still crisp.
Fold in pineapple chunks and black olives just before serving. Serve steamed collards over a bed of pasta or as a side dish.
Garnish with fresh herbs like basil or parsley if desired.
